name: account_inactive_warning

metadata.description: Warning email sent to users approaching inactivity auto-disable.
notes: Sent 7 days before auto-disable (configurable via ACCOUNT_INACTIVE_WARNING_DAYS).
User can reactivate by simply logging in.

subject_template: Your account will be disabled in {{ days_until_disable }} days
text_template:
Hello,

Your account has been inactive for over {{ inactive_days }} days. It will be automatically disabled in {{ days_until_disable }} days unless you log in.

To keep your account active, simply log in before the deadline.

If you no longer need this account, no action is required.
html_template:
Account Inactivity Warning

Your account has been inactive for over {{ inactive_days }} days and will be automatically disabled in {{ days_until_disable }} days.

To keep your account active, simply log in before the deadline.

If you no longer need this account, no action is required.

Sent by Django-MOJO
